item.description:
Release v4.14.1

Changes since v4.14.0

  • feat(cad-designer): add aluminum profile 3D CAD designer plugin
  • feat(file-tree-v2): complete missing features to align with VS Code explorer
  • feat(logging): add SuperLog heartbeat logging to resident loops
  • fix(devicemonitor): wrap GPU/Battery/Storage startup logs with verbose guard
  • fix(editor): wire up addToChatHandler for xcstrings AI fix button
  • fix(file-tree-v2): fix logging format in TreeViewV2 onAppear/onDisappear
  • fix(file-tree-v2): fix reloadItems index path type for NSCollectionView
  • fix(file-tree-v2): standardize logging to follow SuperLog convention
  • fix(menu-bar): break effectiveAppearance KVO feedback loop causing 100% CPU
  • i18n: translate or localize content
  • refactor: migrate FileTreeCollectionViewController logging from os.Logger to SuperLogKit
  • refactor: simplify SplitViewAutosaveConfigurator and fix layout timing
  • refactor(file-tree-v2): decouple from EditorFileTreePlugin
